heading: Today
text: Periods of snow from Rt. 2 south early will end by mid-morning.  Mostly cloudy, with some breaks of afternoon sun, mainly west of the Green Mountains.  Highs in the 30s to low 40s.  Winds becoming southeast up to 10 mph, increasing to 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph through the Champlain Valley and over the higher terrain.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy, with the chance of a little rain or freezing rain from the Adirondacks and Rt. 4 north.  Lows in the upper 20s to mid 30s.  Winds light through NH, increasing from the south 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph from the Green Mountains west.

heading: Saturday
text: A chance of localized rain or freezing rain north early, then mostly cloudy.  Some breaks of afternoon sun south, with a chance of showers late.  Mild.  Highs in the upper 40s to mid 50s.  South winds increasing to 10 to 25 mph, gusting 30 to 40 mph, strongest through the Champlain Valley and over the higher terrain.
